steps: Log in with your PayPal Business account credentials
Enter an app name and set App Type to 'Merchant'
Confirm your Business Account is correctly selected and click 'Create App'
On the app detail page, copy the Client ID (visible immediately)
Click 'Show' next to Client Secret and copy it — store securely
notes: A PayPal Business account is required (personal accounts cannot create apps)
For testing, use sandbox credentials at https://developer.paypal.com/dashboard/applications/sandbox
Sandbox and live apps have separate Client ID and Secret pairs
Token endpoint: POST https://api-m.paypal.com/v1/oauth2/token with Basic auth (client_id:client_secret)
PayPal supports 200+ markets; check country/currency availability for your use case

test_endpoint.description: List invoices to verify credentials are working
